untranslatable_reason: Double Top pattern recognition requires visual/structural analysis of peak formation and support level identification that cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators. Specific requirements: (1) Detection of two peaks at similar price levels, (2) Identification of a support zone between the peaks, (3) Confirmation of breakout below support. These structural pattern elements require candlestick pattern detection or custom peak/trough logic not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: Used pivot as approximate support level and entry on close breaking below pivot (s1). Stop loss set to 0.15 (15 basis points) per source text reference. However, this does not capture the true pattern mechanics (two peaks at similar levels, support zone confirmation, etc.). A proper Double Top implementation would require custom pattern recognition logic or additional indicators for local extrema detection.
